feedback.title: Did this help?
feedback.subtitle: Your feedback helps us understand what works best for you

slides.title: Welcome to Stress Guide
slides.description: Your personal mental wellness companion. Track your stress, practice relief techniques, and build healthy habits.

slides.title: Log Your Stress
slides.description: When you feel stressed, tap "I'm Stressed" to log your trigger and intensity level.

slides.title: Choose Your Relief
slides.description: Select from 5 evidence-based techniques: Breathing, Grounding, Brain Dump, Movement, or Thought Reframing.

slides.title: Track Your Progress
slides.description: View your history, gain insights from your patterns, and unlock achievements as you build your streak.

slides.title: Build Healthy Habits
slides.description: Consistent practice leads to better stress management. Start your journey today!

insights.title: Your Insights
insights.subtitle: Understand your emotional patterns and progress
insights.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet. Log more stress events to see insights!

motivation.title: You're doing great
motivation.text: Every emotion you track helps you understand yourself better.

empty.title: No Insights Yet
empty.description: Start tracking your emotions to discover helpful patterns and insights.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Track your progress and unlock badges

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose when and how MindEase reaches out to you.

dailyCheckIn.label: Daily Check-in
dailyCheckIn.description: A gentle nudge to log how you are feeling

streakReminder.label: Streak Reminder
streakReminder.description: Encouragement to keep your daily streak going

mindfulBreak.label: Mindful Break
mindfulBreak.description: A midday prompt to pause and breathe

weeklyInsights.label: Weekly Insights
weeklyInsights.description: Your stress patterns and progress summary

postSessionCheckIn.label: Post-session Check-in
postSessionCheckIn.description: Ask how you feel 30 minutes after a stress session

achievementCelebrations.label: Achievement Celebrations
achievementCelebrations.description: Instant cheers when you unlock something new

reEngagement.label: Re-engagement
reEngagement.description: A soft check-in after 3 days of inactivity

empty.title: Begin your journey
empty.subtitle: Each session you log becomes a step toward understanding yourself better.

stressFlow.title: Log Your Stress
stressFlow.subtitle: Take a moment to understand what you're feeling
stressFlow.promptTitle: Name it before you change it
stressFlow.promptBody: Choose what is driving the stress, then rate the intensity so the next exercise can fit the moment.

actionSelection.title: Choose Your Action
actionSelection.subtitle: Select a technique to help you right now

actions.title: Breathing Exercise
actions.description: Calm your mind with guided breathing

actions.title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
actions.description: Instant anxiety control using your senses

actions.title: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
actions.description: Release tension by tensing and relaxing muscle groups
